case_title: OMAR YAHMADI VS. CYBELLE'S PIZZA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAHMADI, OMAR AS TO DEFENDANT CYBELLE'S PIZZA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHEHADEH, IHAB TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA DBA CYBELLE'S PIZZA AND ICE CREAM SHEHADEH, AYMAN TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA DBA CYBELLE'S PIZZA AND ICE CREAM JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAHMADI, OMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CYBELLE'S PIZZA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHEHADEH, IHAB TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA DBA CYBELLE'S PIZZA AND ICE CREAM SHEHADEH, AYMAN TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA DBA CYBELLE'S PIZZA AND ICE CREAM $27,569.99 PRINCIPAL, $461.20 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,481.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
